bounded_handback.engine_alias: Preserved engine === acp because pkg/sdk/codex/tests/codex.test.ts contains the accepted public assertion. The physical adapter remains spawnProcess; no facade or breaking alias migration was invented.
bounded_handback.next_gate: Independent verifier must replay deterministic, type, build, lint, diff, and authenticated integration gates before acceptance.
bounded_handback.workspace_and_lock: No dependency or workspace metadata change was required by this PKR.

implementation: CodexAcpConfig now requires auth and shutdownTimeoutMs in addition to explicit roots and permission policy.
ACP spawn declares the environment atom and passes either the explicit global environment or an API-key environment containing CODEX_API_KEY.
Cleanup closes the ACP connection, sends SIGTERM, waits one configured bound, escalates to SIGKILL, waits one second bound, and rejects with CodexShutdownError rather than hanging or claiming zero.
Child stderr is drained, child close is observed rather than only signal delivery, and request maps clear on every cleanup path.

Deterministic public-scope tests cover escalation, typed second-bound failure, double close exactly once, explicit auth environment, missing auth/config, roots, permissions, empty MCP, and the static model-to-turn-to-prompt-to-boundary graph chain.
README examples now declare ACP auth and shutdownTimeoutMs.
